whoCan.heading: Who Can Join
whoCan.intro: RELOFY is built for verified industry professionals and service providers across these sectors:

immigration.title: Immigration & Legal
immigration.description: Consultants, licensed lawyers/law firms, compliance & appeal experts

relocation.title: Relocation & Destination
relocation.description: Settling-in services, school support, move management

housing.title: Housing & Property
housing.description: Rentals, property brokerage, property management, commercial real estate

corporate.title: Corporate & Compliance
corporate.description: Accountants, tax advisors, payroll providers, EOR, HR & global mobility

logistics.title: Logistics & Mobility
logistics.description: Shipment, air tickets, airport services, arrival/departure logistics

financial.title: Financial & Insurance
financial.description: Health insurance, money transfer, financial services & advisory

business.title: Business & Investment Support
business.description: Business buy/sell services, business setup support, investment advisory

whoCan.quote: If you support a newcomer's life and compliance in a new country, you belong in this network.

howitWorks.heading: How the System Works (Easy + Professional)
howitWorks.intro: To keep the process clean for everyone, RELOFY uses two stages:

stage1.title: Stage 1: Lead (Interest + Screening)
stage1.description: When someone signs up in the portal/mobile app, they are considered a Lead. A Lead can enter in three ways:
stage1.entry1: Client signs up via portal/mobile app (Lead created automatically)
stage1.entry2: Partner adds a Lead inside the Partner Portal
stage1.entry3: Sweden Relocators adds a Lead via marketing/corporate onboarding
stage1.during: During the Lead stage, we do:
stage1.documents: Early document requirements (only what's needed to assess)
stage1.kyc: Initial KYC checks (identity and credibility checks, proportionate to the service)
stage1.routing: Internal routing review (which country + which partner)
stage1.note: At this stage, no partner is forced into unpaid work. The Lead stage exists to filter noise and protect partner time.

stage2.title: Stage 2: Client (Agreement + Payment = Activation)
stage2.description: A Lead becomes a Client only when they:
stage2.delivery: Service delivery begins under the network's workflow
stage2.benefit: This protects partners, protects clients, and creates a professional standard.

oneProfile.heading: The One Profile System (Your Real Advantage)
oneProfile.intro: Once converted to Client, RELOFY activates:

oneClient.title: One Client = One Digital Case File (Profile)
oneClient.description: This Profile replaces old paper folders, scattered emails, and WhatsApp threads.

inside.title: Inside one Profile:
inside.identity: Verified identity status (KYC completed level shown)
inside.checklist: Service checklist + milestones (submission, biometrics, decision, move-in, delivery, etc.)
inside.log: Communication log (all messages and updates in one place)
inside.audit: Audit trail (who did what, when – critical for professional trust)

sharing.title: Role-based sharing
sharing.intro: Partners see only what they need:
sharing.immigration: Immigration partner sees immigration scope + documents
sharing.housing: Housing partner sees housing scope + lease documents
sharing.accountant: Accountant sees tax/payroll scope + compliance documents
sharing.logistics: Logistics sees shipment scope + delivery details
sharing.benefit: This protects privacy and reduces confusion.

networkGrowth.heading: Network Growth = Your Business Growth (Global Without Branches)
networkGrowth.intro: RELOFY is designed so partners can grow globally without opening offices and without time-zone communication chaos.

example.title: Example: You are in UAE
example.scenario: A Lead asks for Denmark work permit help. You:
example.add: Add the Lead into the portal (or it comes via signup)
example.forwards: Forwards the case to the right Denmark partner after conversion
example.benefit: If the Lead signs + pays (becomes Client): the Profile is assigned to Denmark partner, your referral is recorded automatically, and your commission becomes trackable.
example.reverseSub: A partner in Sweden receives a Lead for your expertise (Canada, UAE, Australia, UK etc.) → They submit it → we route it to you → you deliver → you invoice under B2B.
example.flow: This creates reciprocal flow: you feed the network, the network feeds you.

scenario1.title: Scenario 1: Full Family Relocation (multi-service)
scenario1.description: Client needs immigration + housing + school support + shipment + insurance. One Profile connects all services. Client sees one journey. Partners deliver faster.

scenario2.title: Scenario 2: Cross-border referral (earn without expansion)
scenario2.description: You add a Denmark case from UAE. Denmark partner delivers. You earn referral commission once converted and paid, without any Denmark office or licensing.

scenario3.title: Scenario 3: Corporate employee relocation (high-value case)
scenario3.description: Company needs work permit + payroll/tax setup + housing. Immigration + accountant + housing partner collaborate inside one Profile.

scenario4.title: Scenario 4: Add-on services (revenue multiplier)
scenario4.description: Visa client triggers: pet relocation, money transfer, air ticket, arrival taxi, insurance. More services = more earnings + better client experience.

scenario5.title: Scenario 5: Long-term lifecycle (repeat revenue)
scenario5.description: Client later needs renewals, family cases, accounting/tax, property purchase. Profile history remains structured → easier upsell and long-term retention.

compliance.heading: Compliance, Safety & Trust (What Partners Expect Today)
compliance.intro: Because Sweden Relocators is the front-facing brand, we run a serious trust layer:

dataProtection.title: Data protection mindset
dataProtection.documents: Secure document handling and audit logs
dataProtection.gdpr: (Designed for a GDPR-aligned way of working.)

territory.heading: Territory Protection (Partner Value Protection)
territory.intro: We don't overcrowd the same territory for the same core service. If we already have sufficient active partners in a city/province:
territory.onHold: Your application may be placed on hold, or temporarily declined
territory.benefit: This keeps the program profitable for committed partners and avoids turning it into a crowded marketplace.

workingModel.title: Working model
workingModel.flow: Lead → signs agreement + pays → becomes Client → partner delivers → partner invoices → payout processed

commissions.title: Referral commissions:
commissions.payable: Become payable once conversion conditions are met
commissions.paid: Are paid within the agreed timeframe (e.g., 30 days where applicable)
commissions.traceable: Everything remains traceable to the Profile.

summary.heading: That is RELOFY
summary.step1: Lead enters the system (signup / partner add / our onboarding).
summary.step3: When agreement is signed and fee is paid, Lead becomes Client.
summary.step6: Invoices and commissions are tracked and paid professionally.

cta.heading: Ready to Grow Your Business?
cta.description: Join the RELOFY partner network and connect with clients globally. Build your business without expanding your office.
